title: Sky island Survival
description: Every dimension is made up of floating islands, try not to trip.
body:
Oops! all islands.

The world is made up of floating islands, with all biomes and structures intact including caves. There are dungeons to explore, dangerous bosses to fight, and rare creatures to meet.
ars nouveau and Biomancy provide some fun progression and automation, and Valkyrien skies provides some cool transportation. 
a fun challenge for solo or multiplayer!
